instruction:
A restaurant offers a catering service which costs \$22.50 per person with a \$117.00 service charge. For parties of 60 or more people, a group discount applies, and the cost is \$18.50 per person along with the service charge dropping to \$58.00. Write a piecewise-defined linear function which calculates the total cost $T$ of the catering service which serves $n$ people.
$\begin{array}{cccc}\hline &  T(n)=\left\lbrace \begin{array}{cc} &\\ &\\ &\\ &\\ &\\ &\\ &\\ &\\ &\\ &\\ \end{array}\right. & & [ANS]if [ANS] \leq n \leq [ANS] [ANS]if n \geq [ANS] \\ \hline \end{array}$
